impacts.title: Enterprise Private 5G Networks: 50,000 Factories by FY2028
impacts.pitch: We help Indian manufacturers design, deploy, and manage private 5G networks for industrial IoT — our turnkey private network solution handles spectrum allocation, radio planning, edge compute integration, and IoT device management, enabling manufacturers to deploy operational 5G connectivity in under 90 days.

impacts.title: Smart Factory Industry 4.0: 35% Large Manufacturers Deploying IoT
impacts.pitch: We accelerate smart factory deployment for Indian manufacturers — our Industry 4.0 integration platform connects existing machines (CNC, PLCs, SCADA) with cloud analytics and AI quality inspection in weeks, without replacing legacy equipment, reducing deployment cost by 60% versus full brownfield upgrades.

impacts.title: Last-Mile Delivery AI Optimization: 22% Efficiency Gain on 5G
impacts.pitch: We deliver last-mile delivery optimization for logistics companies using AI routing and 5G real-time data — our platform processes traffic, weather, vehicle capacity, and delivery time window constraints in real time, consistently achieving 18-25% delivery efficiency improvements within 60 days of deployment.

impacts.title: Cold Chain IoT Sensors: FSSAI Mandate + ₹8,000 Crore Market by 2028
impacts.pitch: We help pharma and food exporters achieve FSSAI IoT temperature logging compliance before the June 2026 deadline — our cold chain sensor platform provides GPS-tracked, tamper-evident temperature monitoring with 30-day data retention, audit-ready reports, and direct integration with FSSAI's compliance portal.

impacts.title: Predictive Maintenance Platforms: 40% Downtime Reduction at Steel & Cement
impacts.pitch: We deploy predictive maintenance platforms for heavy industry that detect equipment failures 3-4 weeks before they occur — our IoT sensor fusion and ML failure prediction models are pre-trained on 15,000+ industrial equipment failure datasets, enabling rapid deployment without custom model training periods.

impacts.title: Manufacturing IoT Investment: ₹25,000 Crore FY2026, PLI-Driven
impacts.pitch: We help PLI scheme recipients maximize IoT investment ROI by ensuring digital traceability systems meet the production and quality metrics reporting requirements — our PLI compliance IoT platform generates automated production traceability reports in the format required by the Ministry of Heavy Industries.
